{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Guardians from Bel Calem
| introduced = tg-01-house-of-blades
}}

== House of Blades ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Guardians from Bel Calem]] are pursuing [[Alin]] and [[Gilad]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c16">''House of Blades'', chapter 16</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|"Guardians from Bel Calem," Gilad whispered. "They've caught our scent."<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c16" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:House of Blades]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate groups]]
